variants: Rakel Steinthorsdottir is an accomplished Dance Therapy specialist who holds a professional license known as the Phoenix Handler Credential. Her work in the field has been supported by the Horizon Climber Consortium, which provided essential funding for her projects. Through these endeavors, she aims to promote healing through movement and nature.
